payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet showing the top edge and a flat rectangular front/top panel with a low-sheen veneer and minor wear; image is edge-cropped and under low light, estimated distance ~0.8 m from camera.
